blog_title: Polyester vs Cotton T-Shirts for Monsoon Season — Why ₹40K Cotton Stock Went Unsold in July
caption:
July monsoon hit—a printer's ₹40k cotton stock went unsold. He never tried polyester.

This happens every year. Cotton stays wet and sticky in rain. Customers want dry-fit polyester instead.

One Pune brand stocked 2000 polyester blanks before June. Sold out in 45 days. ₹1.5 lakh extra profit.

Cotton demand returns by October—just swap for the season.

Save this if you're planning monsoon inventory 👇
